reviews.review_description: Was fun able to use any karaoke video from YouTube.  After recent update you are not able to anymore and must buy subscription shame.

I agree, too much latency no matter what settings you tweak.
Casting is so laggy it's unusable.
Good selection of songs but this wont keep the party flow going at all.
zero country genre songs! not one! alot of popluar songs and not one listed

i got rick rolled 😑
🚩🚩🚩
Great selection of songs the only thing there’s a lot of echo no matter what you do with the settings but it’s still not a bad game. Good fun for a group.
Couldn't hear the music

Latency while singing makes you drag in every song and it is bad.
Somewhat good playlist anyway.
Good for fun but not for practice.

When i listen back to my recordings, my voices cuts in and out.  Is there a fix to this? I'm not using an external mic,  just the headset. I have tried adjusting the app audio relative to mic audio but that didn't solve the problem.
The delay is awful and the echo is so annoying and you just can’t turn it off, even when is off. NOT WORTH IT
i'm don't know how i got charged 2.99 i never hit agreed button
I like this game
The microphone audio is terrible. They have barely any songs. And the really insulting part is you can now only sing 5 songs before they ask you for money.

reviews.review_title: Why can’t the playback ever work please
reviews.review_description: Fix please the playback and the mic or whatever sucks read the reviews

This app used to be Sing Together. And was a 100% free. You could sing as many songs a you like. Song selections came from You Tube. It has recently been rebranded as Sing Room. Now you only get 3 free songs to sing a day, unless you buy coins to use as payment for a premium upgrade that will last for only 6 days. That's consecutive days. If you only use it the first day, come back on the 7th day, you will find your premium has expired. Also you have to pick from a pre-selected list, whether you have premium or not. With your 3 free songs, if you mess up and want to start over, too bad, that counts as one of your free songs. The rebranding really SUCKS. They will "nickel dime" you to death .

developer_response.body:
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and disappointment caused by the rebranding. In order to ensure the long-term direction and sustainable development of our service, we have adopted a partial monetization model. We understand that this change has caused discomfort for many users, and we are committed to making improvements.

Additionally, we would like to clarify a few misunderstandings due to the lack of clear communication regarding our business model. In the case of free songs, they are not deducted immediately upon starting. If you cancel the song within a certain time frame, it will not be counted, so there is no need to worry about accidental launches.

We will continue to work on making our business model more intuitive and reasonable. Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience caused.

reviews.review_description: For some reason all I ever get is reverb and echo, even when turned off.  Would be great if could actually sing without all the bs effects

developer_response.body:
(Additional response)
After checking the issue, I confirmed that setting the effect to 0 disables the effect as expected. If you want to remove the microphone effect entirely, please select "No Microphone."


Hello, setting the Echo and Reverb to 0 should remove these effects as expected. Thank you for reporting this issue. We will review and improve it accordingly.

You can remove microphone effects by selecting the "No Microphone" option from the microphone effect list.

Thank you. We will continue to work towards providing you with a better experience.

reviews.review_title: Fun for a family or Discord night
reviews.review_description: This is a wonderful experience, the only thing I would say to change is to find a way to select results in a YouTube pop up, as some karaoke videos won’t show up on the app, but will in a YouTube search (MachineGun Kiss and Forget December as some examples). Overall though, this is a blast to enjoy with friends

They would fix the lag that people have been complaining about for a long time now. What's karaoke if you are always out of tune because there is a lag between your singing and the beat. Turning off the mic to sing isn't viable because then what would be the point of this app. I could sing along to songs like that IRL without a headset strapped to my head. Please fix this lag. 😂

developer_response.body:
Hello, first of all, I apologize for the inconvenience during your play experience.
Thank you for your valuable feedback. I completely agree with the points you've made. Our development team will work to resolve the issues to provide a better Sing Together experience.

reviews.review_description: Anyone who can sing should know that everyone doesn't sing in the same key. It's fine if you don't care how you sound, but if this app is going to be worth anything, you should have an option to change the key of your favorite song!

developer_response.body:
Hello, Lndsyblu. Thank you so much for playing "Sing Together”.  We appreciate your valuable feedback and apologize for your unsatisfactory experience.
We fully understand the importance of controlling the key of the song.
We will endeavor to provide better service in the future.
Stay tuned for more, thank you.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic idea and I'm glad someone has made a karaoke game, it's just unplayable at the moment on the quest 2 due to a lag on the microphone to what you hear in game. Kind of defeats the object of karaoke but the rest works fine. It's a shame and hopefully soon this will be fixed so I can enjoy playing the game

developer_response.body:
We apologize for any inconvenience you may have experienced with multiplayer.
We will fix it. Stay tuned for future developments! Have a great day and thank you!

reviews.review_description: The app never fully opens. It buffers for so long and the mic & stage never opens I was highly disappointed.

developer_response.body: We apologize for any inconvenience in play. We will strive to provide a better experience, including addressing this issue. You can stay in continuous communication with us through Discord or email, which can be very helpful in resolving these issues. Thank you very much for your feedback, and we apologize once again for the inconvenience experienced
